comment: clj-fff binds libfff_c via the JDK Foreign Function & Memory API; JSON/strings at the boundary are read without reflection, so only the FFM downcall stubs need registering. These are the UNIQUE FunctionDescriptors built in com.blockether.fff/bind! (addr=void*, i64=jlong, i32/u32=jint, u8=jbyte, bool=jboolean, nil-return=void). The native library ships as a classpath resource prebuilds/<platform>/libfff_c.* in com.blockether/fff-native-<platform>; bundle that jar (resources glob below) or set FFF_NATIVE_PATH.
